atlas.put_in: Poisson sprinkling in a d-dim Minkowski interval; then ONLY the causal order a<b
emerged: the dimension read from the relation fraction: d=2->1.99, d=3->2.97, d=4->3.95
surprises: dimension recovered with NO coordinates -- causal order alone carries it
atlas.persistence: kinematic (a property of the order); dynamic geometry inherited from AJL
atlas.not_scripted_check: coordinates are discarded before measuring; the dimension is read out, not labelled
atlas.claim_tier: measured (d_MM(d)~d, denominator-2) ; interpretive (causal order encodes dimension)
floors: kinematic: given causal order -> dimension; dynamic self-organization of geometry is AJL (inherited, not re-run)
Myrheim-Meyer is a Hausdorff-type dimension (cf. spectral dimension, e014 Stage 2)
